name: slate
identity: A tool used in ritual workings, employed by the healer to mark time, breath, and other observations during magical procedures.
current_status: Used by the healer (Anya) to inscribe markings as part of a ritual to disrupt the sickness's progression.

description.value: A slate used for inscribing ritual markings, paired with a stylus for precise markings during magical workings.

purpose.value: Facilitates the ritualistic marking of time, breath, and other observations during magical procedures.

volatile_state.location: Working space around the afflicted man, within the ritual circle.
volatile_state.current_activity: Being used by the healer to mark ritual elements during the magical working.
